items.name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
【Top Grade Original】SOLFERINO BOX Black
2020 IT BAG_ Hot Seller. It conquered the fashion world before it even launched, inspired by the Paris street name Rue De Solferino! The bag uses original factory fine pin-stripe Box calfskin, with excellent texture and flexibility! The interior features a three-layer accordion pocket, easily accommodating daily essentials. The newly designed 'L' letter top and bottom half-open clasp completely overturns your perception of bag clasps, making you exclaim, 'I didn't know a bag could open like this,' simply too fun!
Model: 634306
Size: 19×13×5cm

items.name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
Hobo bag shoulder bag is here✔️
Typical ultra-cool minimalist style, minimalist lovers, come get it.
Minimalist cold style curved shape, overall design simple, lazy yet intellectual. Looks elegant and atmospheric when worn, very light weight. Cowhide texture is super fine! The unique curved design really hits the spot ؔʁ̷ l̲̮ ؔʁ̷✧
Simple and versatile shape, a must-have for K-pop and Japanese fashion influencers.
Go all the way with minimalism, adding a bit of playfulness to the cool style~
Model: 672615
Size: 24.5×18×7cm

items.name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
【Manhattan 24cm】
New in-store synchronized Manhattan Baguette Small 24cm! The latest bag style, a flap Manhattan bag, replaces the classic logo with a low-key, minimalist design style. It is a bit like a Hermès Kelly, full of retro vibes! Combining business and casual, it is versatile! Can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody, multi-functional, satisfying both business women and young girls! Carefully selected original factory leather, perfect stitching, exquisite hardware, exuding a high-end aura!
Model: 675626
Size: 24x17.5x6cm
